not_supported.title: WebGL Not Supported
not_supported.message: Your browser does not support WebGL.
suggestions: Update your browser to the latest version
Enable hardware acceleration in browser settings

disabled.title: WebGL Disabled
disabled.message: WebGL is disabled in your browser settings.
suggestions: Check if an extension is blocking WebGL

context_lost.title: Graphics Context Lost
context_lost.message: The graphics context was lost due to GPU overload.

extension_missing.title: Missing WebGL Extension
extension_missing.message: A required WebGL extension is not available.
suggestions: Model may use unsupported GPU features
